chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2641 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَعِيدٌ اَلْأَعْرَجُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَعْقِدُ إِزَارَهُ فِي عُنُقِهِ قَالَ «لاَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2641 - Sa'id al-A'raj asked Imam (as) about a Muhrim tying his loincloth (izar) around his neck.
Imam (as) said: "No."
